scope_phases.name: Project Development
scope_phases.description: Concept design, area program validation, preliminary layouts

scope_phases.name: Architectural Design
scope_phases.description: Architectural design set, material palettes, renderings

scope_phases.name: Contractor Selection
scope_phases.description: Bid process, contractor evaluation and recommendation

scope_phases.name: Construction Administration
scope_phases.description: Site supervision, RFI responses, progress reporting, project close

revision_assumptions: Two rounds of revisions included per phase. Additional revisions billed at hourly rate.
